key_changes: Enhanced CalendarCard component with label colors and due date badges
Added tooltip support showing card details on hover
Implemented HTML5 drag-and-drop for calendar cards
Added visual feedback during drag operations (opacity, drop zone highlighting)
Connected drop handlers to API for updating card due dates
Added comprehensive unit tests for all drag-and-drop functionality
technical_highlights: Used native HTML5 drag-and-drop API for simplicity
Maintained date/time precision during drag operations
Implemented consistent behavior across month and week views
Added CSS-based visual feedback for better UX
